text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking around<n>the campus...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dang it! I can't... reach!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is repeatedly jumping<n>and
grabbing at a flyer that's caught<n>on a tree
branch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you looking at? Don't you<n>have better
things to do than stare at<n>people like a weirdo?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you mocking me or<n>something? I got
this, so just leave<n>me alone.
choice_data_list: At least let me cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Are you mocking me or<n>something? I got
this, so just leave<n>me alone.
choice_data_list: At least let me cheer you on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up! I don't need any of that!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She shuts down every offer I make,<n>so I resort to
secretly watching over<n>her to make sure she
doesn't injure<n>herself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm going to get this thing no matter<n>what!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her unparalleled stamina,<n>Narita
Taishin continues to jump at the<n>flyer for what
seems like forever until<n>at last...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: HAH! Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, victory at last. Am I good, or<n>what?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
This just goes to show that you can<n>reach any
goal as long as you never<n>give up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're so annoying! I never asked<n>you for help,
did I?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Whatever! Fine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the energy to deal with<n>you. If you
want to help, then hurry up<n>and do something!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Together, we look for things to stand<n>on so we
can pull down the branches<n>and reach the flyer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All right, I should be able to get it<n>now... Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her powerful legs, we're<n>finally able to
get the flyer down!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. That was too much work for<n>what it's
worth... But...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You were more helpful than I thought<n>you'd be. I
was sure you'd be<n>useless.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There are so many things I can learn<n>from the
way Narita Taishin utilizes her<n>body, especially
her leg strength.
